back_alley_fixer.name: Back-Alley Fixer
back_alley_fixer.fallback: Learned to repair things that were never meant to be opened, using tools that were never meant for the job.
back_alley_fixer.accessible: Background: Back-Alley Fixer. +1 Insight. Rank 1 Tinker and Scheme. Starts with Improvised Tools and one Repair Patch.

signature_ability.name: Field Conversion
signature_ability.fallback: Once per room, convert a visible harmless object into a one-use tool if the table can explain its function.
signature_ability.accessible: Signature ability: Field Conversion. Once per room, convert a visible harmless object into a one-use tool if the table can explain its function.

guarded_stance.name: Guarded Stance
guarded_stance.fallback: Plant both feet and take the hit on purpose.
guarded_stance.accessible: Card: Guarded Stance. Reaction, self only. Blocks 2 damage from the triggering attack, no roll required.
guarded_stance.accessible_text: Guarded Stance. Reaction. Target: self. Blocks 2 damage from the attack that triggered it. No roll.

plain_warning.name: Plain Warning
plain_warning.fallback: A short, unambiguous sentence spoken so everyone in earshot understands it the same way.
plain_warning.accessible: Card: Plain Warning. Free speech, affects the current room, can target an ally or an enemy. Records a warning fact, no roll required.
plain_warning.accessible_text: Plain Warning. Free speech. Range: the current room. Target: one ally or one enemy. Records that a warning was given. No roll.

rally_cry.name: Rally Cry
rally_cry.fallback: One sharp, sincere word aimed at whoever needs it most.
rally_cry.accessible: Card: Rally Cry. Main action, affects the current room, targets one ally. Removes the Frightened condition, no roll required.
rally_cry.accessible_text: Rally Cry. Main action. Range: the current room. Target: one ally. Removes the Frightened condition from the target. No roll.

read_the_room.name: Read the Room
read_the_room.fallback: Take a breath and notice what everyone else is missing.
read_the_room.accessible: Card: Read the Room. Quick interaction, affects the current room, targets self. Insight + Read check against DC 11.
read_the_room.accessible_text: Read the Room. Quick interaction. Range: the current room. Target: self. Roll Insight + Read vs DC 11. Strong success records a major observed tell, clean success records a minor one, a costly success records a partial read, a setback costs 1 Energy re-focusing.

signature_flourish.name: Signature Flourish
signature_flourish.fallback: One line, delivered exactly the way this hero would say it.
signature_flourish.accessible: Card: Signature Flourish. Free speech, affects the current room, targets self. Records that the hero's signature persona moment was declared, no roll required. Persona signature card, granted during character creation regardless of chosen background.
signature_flourish.accessible_text: Signature Flourish. Free speech. Range: the current room. Target: self. Records that the hero's signature persona moment was declared. No roll.

steady_strike.name: Steady Strike
steady_strike.fallback: A disciplined melee blow, thrown with more control than force.
steady_strike.accessible: Card: Steady Strike. Main action, melee range, targets one enemy. Force + Bonk check against DC 11.
steady_strike.accessible_text: Steady Strike. Main action. Melee range. Target: one enemy. Roll Force + Bonk vs DC 11. Strong success deals 3 damage, clean success deals 2, a costly success deals 1 damage, a setback grants the enemy Advantage on its next action.

argumentative_buckler.name: Argumentative Buckler
argumentative_buckler.fallback: A successful Block lets the hero Challenge the attacker's stated intent.
argumentative_buckler.accessible: Item: Argumentative Buckler. A shield. On a successful Block reaction, the hero may Challenge the attacker's stated intent.

battered_buckler.name: Battered Buckler
battered_buckler.fallback: A dented shield that has already stopped worse blows than this one.
battered_buckler.accessible: Item: Battered Buckler. A dented shield. Starting item for the Retired Monster Hunter background.
